notes.text: Do not rotate staggered tires from front to back. If tires are asymmetric(directional), do not rotate side to side. Follow all OEM tire rotation recommendations and pattern.
When maintenance message 4 is on the multi-information display.
Adjust valves during services A, B, 1, 2, or 3 only if they are noisy.

taxonomy.literalName: Engine Coolant System Drain, Flush & Refill

notes.text: If the "Service Due Now " message does not appear more than 12 months after the display is reset, change engine oil every year.
